name: deviltown's abandoned apartment
content: the first days, they're always-
the hardest. the first brace,
the first dive, skin me alive,
bee hive torture. honey,
you've stung me, one thousand-
cuts, no ifs, no buts, you've-
hung me, string of shower robes,
the emperor's running out of clothes.
queen of hearts, I was your jack-
of all trades. you on the throne,
me on the floor. the water's cold, but-
there's no space left on your floating door.
luxury yacht, sail past me,
and catch your sinking cruise. but-
tie this knot, sailor, at last,
don't cut your anchor loose.
queen of hearts, the deck is over.
you're on the edge, don't fall the way-
the night tends to. hang by the stars,
not the bar.
you've strayed too far, don't be so-
sour with me. i miss talking to you.
see me from the sky, through the glass,
see me, rosemary, but don't break your vase.
remember to text, i miss you being-
mean to me, or sarcastic, or some other-
pleasant way of saying the same thing.
there's not much time left, not much string.
im back now, but you're not home. I-
asked the gnome, and looked under-
the carpet. waffle cone, you aren't-
edible. no wonder.
